channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Tkachuk skates with Panthers, as playoff opener at Lightning looms closer
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Matthew Tkachuk skated with the Florida Panthers in practice on Saturday, a sign that he may be ready to rejoin the lineup for Game 1 of the playoffs. The Panthers, who won the Stanley Cup last season, open Round 1 at Tampa Bay on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: New York Rangers fire coach Peter Laviolette after missing the playoffs
item.description: Peter Laviolette was fired as coach of the New York Rangers on Saturday, ending his tenure after two seasons, the second of which was a massive underachievement of missing the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Greg Cronin fired as coach of Anaheim Ducks after 2 seasons
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) — Greg Cronin was fired Saturday as coach of the Anaheim Ducks after two seasons, general manager Pat Verbeek announced. “He is responsible in many ways for the improvement we’ve seen from our young core.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Prep roundup: Leigh beats Willow Glen as sophomore’s first hit is a homer; Foothill, Branham win thrillers
item.description: An exciting day of Bay Area baseball and softball ended with Leigh, Los Gatos, Foothill, Branham, Mills, Prospect, Amador Valley and San Leandro as big winners in high school diamond action across the East Bay, South Bay and Peninsula.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Lindor hits 1st walk-off homer for Mets, 250th home run of career, in 5-4 win over Cardinals
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Francisco Lindor knew. He didn't have to watch. He turned on an inside cutter from Ryan Fernandez leading off the ninth inning and sent the ball soaring into Citi Field's second deck in right field, 401 feet away. “I hit it with everything I had,” he said.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Grizzlies beat the Mavericks 120-106 to set up a 1st-round playoff series with the Thunder
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Ja Morant shrugged off a sprained right ankle to score 22 points and add nine assists and the Memphis Grizzlies beat the Dallas Mavericks 120-106 on Friday night to advance to the NBA playoffs.
item.dc:creator: CLAY BAILEY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Boston Marathon and city insist all are welcome. But some runners say politics will keep them home
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — The Boston Marathon and Mayor Michelle Wu insisted on Friday that international runners and other foreign visitors remain welcome in the city and said there is no evidence that travel for this year’s race has fallen off in the face of increased border scrutiny.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Yankees' Jazz Chisholm Jr. suspended 1 game following ejection, violation of social media policy
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — New York Yankees second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. was suspended for one game and fined by Major League Baseball on Friday following his ejection during a game at the Tampa Bay Rays and violation of MLB’s social media policy.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CIF Petco Park Series: Ramona 1, Valley Center 0
item.description: Ramona takes the 1-nothing win over Valley Center in CIF San Diego's John Baumgarten Classic at Petco Park.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: WWE legend Paul Heyman heaps praise on Paul Levesque ahead of Hall of Fame induction
item.description: WWE legend Paul Heyman told Fox News Digital in a recent interview that it was "long overdue" for Paul “Triple H” Levesque to enter the WWE Hall of Fame.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: PWHL chooses Vancouver as 1st expansion city with 2nd market to be determined, AP source says
item.description: The PWHL’s first expansion team will be based in Vancouver with an announcement scheduled for next week, a person with knowledge of the decision confirmed to The Associated Press on Friday. The person spoke on the condition of anonymity because the league has not revealed its plans.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Saints All-Pro tackle Ryan Ramczyk, 30, retires after battling through knee injury
item.description: New Orleans Saints tackle Ryan Ramczyk is stepping away from football after eight years, the All-Pro announced Thursday in a social media post.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Final AP mock NFL draft: Ward, Hunter, Carter go 1-2-3 and Saints trade up for Sanders
item.description: The Tennessee Titans explored all their options with the No. 1 pick in the NFL draft. They can’t pass up a shot at a potential franchise quarterback. If the Titans were going to trade the pick for more draft assets, a deal would’ve happened already.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Warriors-Rockets schedule for first-round playoff series
item.description: (KRON) -- They took the hard way in, but the Golden State Warriors are officially in the playoffs after securing a spot in Tuesday's nail-biting win over the Memphis Grizzlies. The No. 7 seed Dubs (48-34) will face the No. 2 seed Houston Rockets (52-30) in the first round.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: The Young Bulls, Lonzo Ball and future of his highly-touted twin sons with Carlos Boozer
item.description: Carlos Boozer recently spoke with Jarrett Payton to discuss the Chicago Bulls' young team, Lonzo Ball's injury, and his sons' basketball success, with both Cameron and Cayden Boozer being highly-touted high school recruits and planning to attend Duke University.
item.dc:creator: Jarrett Payton, WGN 9

item.title: Crochet is still Crochet, even if Red now precedes 'Sox' on the front of his jersey
item.description: Garrett Crochet, the former White Sox pitcher, made his debut for the Boston Red Sox on Sunday, shutting down the Chicago White Sox with 11 strikeouts and one run. Despite the trade, Crochet has expressed his fondness for his former team and the memories he made on Chicago's South Side.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Rory McIlroy wins Masters playoff to complete the career Grand Slam
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — The closer Rory McIlroy came to fulfilling his lifetime dream — winning the Masters — the more it kept slipping away. Sunday at Augusta National felt like his last 11 years in the majors, blunders mixed in with sheer brilliance. A two-shot lead gone in two holes.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Crow-Armstrong homers twice and Cubs take series with 4-2 victory over Dodgers
item.description: Pete Crow-Armstrong hit his first two home runs of the season, including a go-ahead solo shot in the seventh inning, Michael Busch homered against his former team again and the Chicago Cubs beat the Los Angeles Dodgers 4-2 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 89th Masters Tournament
item.description: Roars for Rory. The famous sound of Sunday at the Masters Tournament could be for Rory McIlroy (-12) this year.
item.dc:creator: John Hart, WGN 9

item.title: Rowdies lose homecoming matchup, but stadium comeback brings hope
item.description: For the first time in seven months, Rowdies fans are finally back home at Al Lang Stadium after the waterfront venue was impacted during back-to-back hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Georgia McCarthur, WFLA, NBC
